scene: Carthaginian hulls were sighted shadowing a Massaliote convoy off Iberia. The council must set the city's stance.

choices.label: Vote to arm convoy escorts
choices.resultText: Pentekonters will ride with the silver ships.

choices.label: Vote to send an envoy to Carthage

scene: A motion to cut the tariff on Gaulish grain divides the chamber.

choices.label: Vote to cut it
choices.resultText: Bread gets cheaper. Landowners get louder.

choices.label: Vote to keep it
choices.resultText: The chora's farmers toast your name.

scene: The Ephors open an audit into harbor fees. A colleague quietly asks you to slow it down.

choices.label: Assist the audit fully
choices.resultText: The ledgers open. Some careers close.

choices.label: Misplace a few documents
choices.resultText: Papyrus is so easily mislaid in sea air.

scene: A petition seeks limited civic rights for freedmen who served the city in war.

choices.label: Speak for the petition
choices.resultText: Scarred men in the gallery stand straighter.

choices.label: Speak against it
choices.resultText: Citizenship, you argue, is blood and inheritance.

scene: The Archons request a special levy for two new war galleys.

choices.label: Approve the levy
choices.resultText: Keels will be laid before the next moon.

choices.label: Amend it to one galley plus harbor repairs
choices.resultText: A compromise. Both sides claim half a victory.

scene: Envoys from the Roman Republic seek a renewal of old friendship - and intelligence on the Gauls.

choices.label: Vote for warm renewal
choices.resultText: The old friendship is re-inked. Rome remembers its friends, they say.

choices.label: Renew, but share nothing of the Gauls
choices.resultText: Friendship, yes. Our neighbors' trust is not for sale.

scene: A magistrate stands accused of selling verdicts. His House is powerful; the evidence is strong.

choices.label: Vote to convict
choices.resultText: Justice lands. So does an enemy's grudge.

choices.label: Vote to acquit, bank the favor
choices.resultText: His House now owes you. The agora suspects why.

scene: Engineers report the old wooden wall sections need replacing in stone. The treasury winces.

choices.label: Fund the stone wall
choices.resultText: Protis built in wood. You build in stone.

choices.label: Patch the wood, defer the cost
choices.resultText: It will hold. Probably. For a while.
